prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约1655→1475→1404→1291→1618名。2021至2024年呈逐年前移趋势（位次数字减小），但2025年出现明显后移，较2024 年后移约327名，回到接近2021年水平，波动较大。2025年基准位次约1618名；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划2021年53人、2022年52人、2023年56人、2024年59 人、2025年61人，呈持续小幅扩招态势；2026年计划60人，较2025年减少1人，属微幅缩招，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学是教育部直属的985工程、211 工程、双一流建设高校，以电子信息领域为核心特色；2026年软科中国大学主榜排名第33位，近年排名稳定在28–33区间，属于国内顶尖理工类高校；2026年高 考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校内管理事件和个别教师师德问题，但整体关注度有限；抖音热度排名第33位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映考生关注度不低；未见明显 投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，电子科学与技术、信息与通信工程获评A+，计算机科学与技术获评A，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、管理科学与工程获评A- 。A+学科（电子、通信）与该校招生核心专业高度对应，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年社会热度为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐（67.8），电气工程及其自动化高热推荐（74.28），均为当前最受追捧的工科方向；吉林省2026年高考总人数约110868人，较2025年（111492人）基本 持平，物理类估算约8万人，竞争烈度稳定；电子科技大学位于四川省成都市，属于西南地区，对东北考生有一定地域距 离；该校在吉林省招生计划占比较小（约60人），非主要生源省份，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的波动趋势、2026年微幅缩招（-1人）以及学 校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年1618名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约1632名，区间1387–1877名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 1655 → 1475 → 1404 → 1291 → 1618. From 2021 to 2024, there was a year-on-year upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift, moving back about 327 places compared to 2024, returning to near the 2021 level, with large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1618. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 53 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 61 in 2025, showing a continuous slight expansion. The 2026 plan is 60, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a minor contraction with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university directly under the Ministry of Education, with a core focus on the field of electronic information. In 2026, it ranked 33rd in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 28–33 range, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving campus management incidents and individual teacher ethics issues, but overall attention is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting considerable attention from candidates. No obvious admission gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electronic Science and Technology, and Information and Communication Engineering were rated A+, Computer Science and Technology was rated A, and Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering were rated A-. The A+ disciplines (Electronics, Communication) highly correspond to the university's core enrollment majors, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Electronic Information/Communication majors was high-heat recommendation, Computer majors were recommended (67.8), and Electrical Engineering and Automation was high-heat recommended (74.28), all being the most sought-after engineering directions currently. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Jilin Province is about 110,868, basically flat compared to 2025 (111,492), with Physics Category estimated at about 80,000, maintaining stable competition intensity. University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, in the southwest region, with a certain geographical distance for candidates from the northeast. The university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province accounts for a small proportion (about 60 people), not a major source province, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the slight contraction in 2026 (-1 person), and the slightly negative reputation of the university, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 1618. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1632, with a range of 1387–1877.

- Microelectronics Science and Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Engineering Experimental Class (New Materials, New Energy, and Electronic Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (1387–1877), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Electronics/Communication/Computer) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1400), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, and Electronic Information Class (Information and Communication), which are A+ discipline majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 1800), you should mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科/历史类最低位次依次约1253→1111→1210→943→993名。2024年大幅前移至943名后，2025年小幅后移至993名，近两年整体在940–1000名区间波动 ，2025年基准位次约993名；该校在吉林省文科/历史类招生计划2021–2022年8人，2023–2026年均为4人，2023年起计划减半后保持稳定，2026年计划仍为4人， 与2025年持平，无计划变化带来的竞争影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学是985、211、双一流高校，2026年软科排名第33位，但学校以理工科见长，文科专业设置较少，整体 层次对文科考生吸引力相对有限；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，但主要涉及理工科相关事件，对文科报考影响较小；抖音热度排名第33位（较热），但内容 以理工科为主，文科关注度一般；该校A+学科（电子科学与技术、信息与通信工程）均为工科，文科招生专业（社会科学试验班、外国语言文学类）无对应A类 学科支撑，学科优势对文科考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校文科仅设社会科学试验班（公共管理与法律复合人才培养）和外国语言文学类两个专业；法学类专业社 会热度为分化观望，外语类专业为一般观望，均非当前高热方向；吉林省2026年历史类考生估算约3.08万人，较2025年（3.11万）基本持平，竞争烈度稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次小幅后移趋势、招生计划持平、文科非该校优势领域等因素，预计2026年历史类最低录取位次在2025年993名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约1008名，区间857–1159名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1253→1111→1210→943→993. After a significant advance to 943 in 2024, it slightly retreated to 993 in 2025, fluctuating within the 940–1000 range in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 993. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jilin Province was 8 students in 2021–2022, and 4 students from 2023 to 2026. Since 2023, the plan has been halved and remained stable, with the 2026 plan still at 4 students, unchanged from 2025, resulting in no competitive impact from plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking. However, the university is known for its strengths in science and engineering, with relatively few liberal arts programs, so its overall level has limited appeal to liberal arts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, but mainly related to science and engineering incidents, with little impact on liberal arts admissions. Its Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), but content is primarily focused on science and engineering, with general attention to liberal arts. The university's A+ disciplines (Electronic Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering) are all engineering fields, while its liberal arts enrollment majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature) lack corresponding A-class discipline support, so the disciplinary advantages have limited appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university only offers two liberal arts majors: Social Science Experimental Class (Public Management and Law Compound Talent Training) and Foreign Languages and Literature. Law-related majors have a social popularity of differentiated observation, while foreign language majors have general observation, neither being current high-demand directions. The estimated number of history category candidates in Jilin Province for 2026 is about 30,800, roughly the same as 2025 (31,100), with stable competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight retreat trend in 2025 rankings, unchanged enrollment plans, and liberal arts not being the university's strength, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the history category in 2026 will slightly retreat from the 2025 ranking of 993. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1008, with a range of 857–1159.

- Social Science Experimental Class (Public Management and Law Compound Talent Training) (Administrative Management, Urban Management, Law).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (The university only offers 2 liberal arts majors, so two tiers suffice).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Japanese, French).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The university only offers two liberal arts enrollment majors. With rankings within the predicted range (857–1159), it is recommended to use the Social Science Experimental Class as a sprint/main choice and Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 900), focus on the Social Science Experimental Class. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 1100), prioritize Foreign Languages and Literature.
